nodes.context: Sinti-origin mafia organization operating in Rome and Lazio, involved in extortion, drug trafficking, and other crimes.
Roman criminal organization that allied with Casamonica clan in the 1970s-1990s.
Rival clan eliminated by Casamonica and Banda della Magliana in the late 1970s-early 1980s.
Neapolitan mafia organization that allied with Casamonica clan, providing drugs and protection.
Calabrian mafia organization that allied with Casamonica clan, providing drugs and protection.
Sinti family affiliated with Casamonica clan, also targeted in police operations.
Sinti family affiliated with Casamonica clan, also targeted in police operations.

edges.context: Criminal alliance from 1970s to 1990s; Casamonica provided manpower in exchange for profit share and power consolidation.
Casamonica and Banda della Magliana eliminated the Proietti clan between late 1970s and early 1980s.
Camorra provides drugs and protection to Casamonica; both allies and rivals.
'Ndrangheta provides drugs and protection to Casamonica; both allies and rivals.
Spada is an affiliated Sinti family allied with Casamonica.
Di Silvio is an affiliated Sinti family allied with Casamonica.
